titleStmt.title: SII 27.11: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 11. (A.R. No. 170 of 1933-34.) KĀPPALLE, PUNGANUR TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Hero-stone (No. 7) set up in a field about two furlongs to the east of Lōkanāthēśvara temple.

This record refers to the death of Tigeṭi Muttarasa, a servant of Māsarasa, son of Lōkarasa of Semmagūr when the latter was attacked by Mahārāja, and registers a grant, in his memory, of the village (?) Būdalikeṟe and 30 goḷa of land in Panekeṟe free of all taxes (?) Mada-Muttarasa, grandson of the hero and son of Kēta-Muttarasa had the hero-stone installed.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī kaṇnaradēvaṁ prithivī
rājyaṁgeyyuttire semmagūra
lōkarasara magaṁ māsarasara
mēge mahārājaṁ bandūraḷiviṟi
yaltānnāḻdira muntekādi sattaṁ
tigeṭi muttarasanavaṁge koḍa
ṁge būdalikeṟeyuṁ panakeṟi
yaḻmūvattu goḷa gaddeyubi
ḍugaḍeyuṁ bidirggoyyaluṁ
piṭṭāniḍūdāyamuṁ sarvvapari
hāravāge biṭṭaṁ Ivanamagaṁ kēta
muttarasana magaṁ mada muttarasaṁ mā
ḍisida kalnāḍu .
Digital edition of SII 27.11 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
